package rulecoverage

func NegativeReflectionHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "reflection_hot_path"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "reflect package calls inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
